data.title: Court rejects lawsuit against ban on church endorsements. IRS settlement allows churches to endorse candidates, surprising conservatives.
data.description: Conservatives had anticipated a win in the case as the I.R.S. reached a settlement permitting churches to express endorsement for candidates.

data.title: Artemis-Named Crypto Rallies Over 200%, But Unlike NASA's Historic Mission, These Coins Face Slimmer Odds Of Rocketing 'To The Moon'
data.description: Artemis-themed cryptocurrencies saw a significant rise in value following NASA's recent mission that sent four astronauts on a 10-day journey to orbit the moon. One such token, ARTEMISII on the Solana network, surged over 200% in the last 24 hours, as reported by CoinMarketCap. This token had a fully diluted valuation of $7,000, despite having only $8,100 in liquidity. Another token with a similar name experienced an 11% increase, boasting a higher fully diluted valuation of $28,600. The price of ARTEMISII stood at $0.000007197 with the gain recorded at 11 p.m. EDT. More details can be found on Benzinga.com.

data.title: Chairman of Huione crypto scam charged; accused of running scam centers in Cambodia. Extradited to China to face justice.
data.description: The Huione Group is reportedly linked to crypto scam operations in Cambodia involving tactics like "pig butchering" scams to pilfer cryptocurrency from victims. The centers purportedly served as hubs for executing fraudulent schemes, resulting in significant financial losses for individuals.

data.title: Think tank recommends Taiwan to consider Bitcoin reserve amid conflict, as the Ministry of Justice holds 210 Bitcoins valued at $14 million.
data.description: A Taiwanese legislator named Ko Ju-Chun disclosed that the Ministry of Justice in Taiwan currently possesses 210 Bitcoins, which are valued at $14 million. These coins had been confiscated during various criminal investigations in the past year.

data.title: Dow Jones Futures Fall, Oil Prices Jump As Trump Vows To Hit Iran 'Extremely Hard'; Tesla Deliveries Due
data.description: Stock market futures experienced a decline while oil prices saw an increase following President Trump's declaration that the United States will intensify its actions against Iran over the next 2-3 weeks. This announcement led to a drop in Dow Jones futures and a spike in oil prices. Additionally, in the midst of these developments, upcoming Tesla deliveries are also anticipated.

data.title: Highland Opportunities and Income Fund Announces the Regular Monthly Distribution
data.description: Dallas, today, April 1, 2026 - The Highland Opportunities and Income Fund (NYSE: HFRO), also known as HFRO, declared its standard monthly distribution on common stock at $0.0385 per share. This distribution is set to be paid on April 30, 2026, to shareholders who are recorded as of that date.
